tools.name: list_roadmaps
tools.description: List all tracked wearable product roadmaps. Returns slug, model name, category, expected window, confidence, and last updated date. Optionally filter by category or expected year.

tools.name: get_roadmap
tools.description: Get the full roadmap for a specific wearable product: expected window, price, confidence, why summary, buy advice, outlook, FAQ, reported features with confidence tiers, and leak timeline. Use list_roadmaps first to find the correct slug.

tools.name: get_claims
tools.description: Get reported features and specs for a wearable product, each tagged with a confidence tier: confirmed, unofficially-confirmed (shown as 'Widely reported'), highly-expected, expected, likely, speculated, or pipe-dream. Includes source citations.

tools.name: get_timeline
tools.description: Get the chronological history of leaks, patents, announcements, and rumor events for a wearable product. Each entry has a date, description, and source citation.

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Compare two wearable products side by side using live specs (battery, sensors, price, ecosystem, availability, and more) from the per-category spec tables. One or both can be unreleased. Pass product slugs (see list_roadmaps). Returns [productA, productB] in the requested order.

tools.name: get_glossary
tools.description: Get definitions for wearable technology terms AND product codenames: sensor types (PPG, SpO2, EMG), form factors, platform concepts, category jargon, plus internal codenames like N50, B798, Aperol, Jinju. Each result has a `type` of 'term' or 'codename'. Filterable by term or category.

tools.name: get_laws
tools.description: Get wearable tech regulations and legislation tracked by iDevice. Returns laws affecting smart glasses, rings, watches, earbuds, and AI pendants — enacted, in-pipeline, under review, or voluntary codes. Filterable by status, category, product, or jurisdiction.

tools.name: get_buyers_guide
tools.description: Get a buy-now-or-wait recommendation for a wearable product by slug. Returns model, price, chip, buy recommendation (Buy Now / Wait), cycle position (Just Updated / Mid-Cycle / Nearing End of Cycle), days since release, the editorial buy verdict, and live specs from the per-category spec tables. Use

tools.name: get_product_specs
tools.description: Get detailed technical specs for a wearable product by slug, sourced from the live per-category spec tables (display, chip, battery, sensors, connectivity, price, availability, etc.). Covers the full current lineup, upcoming and shipping. Use a product slug like 'apple-watch', 'oura', 'meta-ray-ban'

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get the latest wearable tech news clusters with editorial commentary from iDevice. Each result is a distinct news story with a one-sentence summary and a multi-sentence editorial take. Optionally filter by product category.

tools.name: list_tracked_products
tools.description: List all wearable products tracked for Amazon pricing on iDevice. Returns subject name, ASIN, title, and product category. Use subject names with get_price_history.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Get Amazon price history for a tracked wearable product over the past 90 days. Returns current price, list price, 90-day low/high, and daily price points. Use list_tracked_products to see available subjects. Includes an affiliate link to buy.

tools.name: search_trials
tools.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov for peer-reviewed clinical studies involving a wearable device. Returns study title, status, phase, enrollment, sponsor, conditions studied, and a brief summary. Useful for understanding the health research evidence behind a device.

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search iDevice's editorial archive of wearable tech news. Covers smart glasses, rings, watches, earbuds, and AI pendants from Apple, Meta, Samsung, Google, Snap, Oura, and others.
